results.rendered_html:
arśas n. [ṛ-asun vyādhau śuṭ ca  Uṇ. 4. 195 ] Piles.
Comp.
— ghna a. destroying piles.
— (ghnaḥ)
1 N. of the plant śuraṇa, so called because it is said
(pb) to cure piles.
2 one part of buttermilk with three parts of water.
— (ghnī)
1 N. of the plant Curculigo Archioides Lin.
2 the marking nut plant (bhallātaka).
— yuj a. afflicted with piles.
— hita a. curing piles.
— (taḥ) the marking nut plant.
